chunks.title: Hezekiah's Plan for Passover
chunks.reason: Describes the king's decision to delay and extend the Passover celebration due to logistical issues.

chunks.title: Royal Proclamation to Israel
chunks.reason: Contains the specific message delivered by couriers urging the northern tribes to return to God.

chunks.title: Response of the Tribes
chunks.reason: Narrates the mixed reactions of the northern tribes and the gathering in Jerusalem.

chunks.title: Purification and Celebration
chunks.reason: Details the removal of idols, the slaughter of lambs, and Hezekiah's prayer for the unclean.

chunks.title: Feast of Unleavened Bread Concludes
chunks.reason: Describes the extended celebration, the king's generosity, and the final blessing.
